author: Yuto Takagi
description: Hosted alternative to org-share: sign in with email, share notes with org / allowlist / public audiences. No Cloudflare setup required. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Share Hosted

name: Share Hosted

releases.author: yut0takagi
releases.description:
First release of Share Hosted.

## Features
- Magic-link sign-in (no Cloudflare setup required)
- 3 audience modes: Org-wide / Specific people / Public link
- Notion/Quartz-style clean rendering with dark mode
- Image upload + R2 hosting
- Compatible with companion BYO plugin (obsidian-org-share)

## Companion service
Backend Worker: https://github.com/yut0takagi/obsidian-share-hosted-worker (multi-tenant, free)
releases.name: v0.1.0 - Initial release
